name: Section index — HYGIENE_DELETE_PROOF.md
what_it_solves: Section index of '/mnt/results/HYGIENE_DELETE_PROOF.md': every heading with its level and starting line.
how_it_solves: Regex `^#{1,6}\s+(.+)$` extracted at generation time; preserves navigation without duplicating body text.
why_it_exists: Downstream ingestors can walk the document by section without re-parsing markdown; the KB stops being an opaque blob.
